methodology.allergens: Essential-only tagging from a 16-tag vocabulary (Celery, Gluten, Crustaceans, Fish, Eggs, Lupin, Molluscs, Mustard, Nuts, Peanuts, Sesame, Soya, Sulphites, Sugared drink, Dairy, Lentils). Poke-specific mapping: soy/teriyaki/miso/edamame/tofu/ponzu -> Soya (and Gluten if wheat-soy); sesame/furikake -> Sesame; salmon/tuna/tobiko/dashi/surimi -> Fish (kani/surimi additionally Crustaceans); shrimp/crab/lobster -> Crustaceans; squid/octopus -> Molluscs; mayo-based sauces (Kewpie, spicy mayo, eel, sriracha mayo, yum-yum, wasabi mayo) -> Eggs. Empty -> NO_ALLERGENS.
methodology.calories: Per-recipe kcal computed from a poke-specific per-100g reference table (sushi rice 165, salmon 208, tuna 132, tofu 76, avocado 160, mango 60, edamame 121, kewpie 710, spicy mayo 600, sesame seeds 573, sesame oil 884, furikake 437, etc.). Quantities in kg/L converted to per-100g; pieces priced via per-piece table. Packaging excluded. Wastage NOT applied to calories. Semi-finished components (sushi rice base, sauces, salad mix) computed as cal/kg from their sub-ingredients and rolled up. Rounded to int.
methodology.wastage_pct: Wastage stored as decimal fraction (10% -> 0.10). Source values normalized from percentage strings.
